pi_items.source: WebFetch and WebSearch confirmed website exists and is a sandbox e-commerce site for web scraping practice (https://books.toscrape.com/)
WebSearch confirmed product page URL is https://books.toscrape.com/catalogue/a-light-in-the-attic_1000/index.html with book title 'A Light in the Attic' by Shel Silverstein
Confirmed in task.json, setup_task.sh (line 29), and export_result.sh (line 12). This is the expected export filename as per task design.

Official Screaming Frog documentation (https://www.screamingfrog.co.uk/seo-spider/tutorials/how-to-analyse-link-position/) confirms inlinks tab exports include columns: From (source page), To (destination page), Anchor text, plus additional columns for Alt text, Follow status, Rel attribute, Target attribute, Status code, Path type, and Link position
Confirmed in task.json metadata, setup_task.sh (line 24), and export_result.sh (line 11). Directory path is consistent across all scripts.

privileged_info_summary: All metadata claims verified: The task targets books.toscrape.com, a real sandbox website for web scraping practice. The specific product page 'A Light in the Attic' exists at the claimed URL fragment 'a-light-in-the-attic_1000'. Screaming Frog SEO Spider's Inlinks tab exports CSV files containing the claimed columns: From, To, and Anchor Text (plus Status, Alt text, Follow status, and other link metadata). The export filename and directory path are consistent across all task scripts. Data is not synthetic—it uses real URLs from a live public website.
